executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Use exclusively the test plan file testsprite_tests/testsprite_frontend_test_plan.json. Generate new Python Playwright scripts only for TS101, TS104, and TS105. Do not use or execute any older scripts TS001-TS005. Treat TS101, TS104, and TS105 as new tests. For TS104, open http://localhost:3000/, click the Meus Palpites navigation visually, and do not navigate to /partidas by entering the URL. Do not modify any files outside testsprite_tests.
